questionHtml: Draw and label the angle of depression on the diagram.
markschemeHtml:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

  (A1)   (C1)

Note: The horizontal line must be shown and the angle of depression must be labelled. Accept a numerical or descriptive label.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Draw and label the angle of depression on the diagram.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 3.2—2d and 3d trig, sine rule, cosine rule, area
SL 3.3—Applications: angles of elevation and depression, bearings
